about.title: A Legacy of Spiritual Wisdom
about.subtitle: Guided by Krishna's Eternal Light
about.desc1: Shastri Shree Amit B. Trivedi is a distinguished Vedic Astrologer with over 12 years of profound experience in guiding souls through the celestial paths of Sanatana Dharma.
about.desc2: Blending traditional astrological calculations with spiritual intuition, he offers precise insights into Kundli, Vastu, and Muhurta to help you achieve harmony and prosperity.
about.quote: nainam chindanti shastrani nainam dahati pavakah | na chainam kledayanty apo na shosayati marutah ||
about.bio: With over 12 years of experience in Vedic astrology, I've helped thousands of seekers find their true purpose and navigate life's challenges. My approach combines traditional Indian astrological principles with modern intuitive understanding to provide clear, actionable guidance.

timeline.item1_desc: Shastri Shree Amit B. Trivedi began his spiritual practice, rooted in deep Vedic scriptures and traditional wisdom.
timeline.item2_desc: Expanded services to include comprehensive Vastu Shastra and traditional Vedic Pooja ceremonies.
timeline.item3_desc: Started providing online consultations, reaching seekers across the globe and guiding them through digital platforms.
timeline.item4_desc: With thousands of satisfied clients, we continue to be a beacon of clarity in life's complexities.

values.v1_desc: Every consultation is approached with deep empathy and a soul-centered perspective.
values.v2_desc: Our readings are strictly based on authentic Vedic scriptures and calculations.
values.v3_desc: We maintain total confidentiality and build lifelong bonds with those we guide.
values.v4_desc: Striving for 100% accuracy through continuous study and spiritual alignment.

about.philosophy_desc: Our process involves more than just reading birth charts. We dive deep into your unique karmic journey, aligning ancient celestial wisdom with your current aspirations. Every soul has a unique cosmic design, and our role is to help you understand and harmonize with it for a fulfilling life.
